name: Luma
tagline: An AI study companion that learns how you learn.
description: A context-aware learning space that turns messy notes into clear explanations, adaptive quizzes, and calm momentum.

name: Aerowave
tagline: Air quality you can actually understand.
description: A beautifully simple mobile experience that translates hyperlocal environmental data into useful daily guidance.

name: Signal Lab
tagline: Find the story hidden inside the noise.
description: An exploratory research interface for discovering patterns, anomalies, and relationships in complex public datasets.

name: Kinetic
description: A tactile web app for building repeatable creative habits without streak anxiety or noisy gamification.

name: Care Canvas
tagline: A calmer handoff for community care.
description: A hackathon-built coordination tool that helps volunteers route requests, share context, and close the loop.
